name: ui-battle-board
description: BattleBoard — reference game board: game-shell/game-hud/canvas-2d descriptor tree with live input wiring (TILE_CLICK/UNIT_CLICK + selectedUnitId/validMoves) and an END_TURN HUD control. The canonical atomic-composition contract for game boards (see docs/Almadar_Std_Game_UI_Lift.md).

schema.name: ui-battle-board
schema.description: BattleBoard — reference game board: game-shell/game-hud/canvas-2d descriptor tree with live input wiring (TILE_CLICK/UNIT_CLICK + selectedUnitId/validMoves) and an END_TURN HUD control. The canonical atomic-composition contract for game boards (see docs/Almadar_Std_Game_UI_Lift.md).

emits.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click
Emits UI:{endTurnEvent} with {} on end turn
Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

events.name: Unit Click
events.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click

events.name: End Turn
events.description: Emits UI:{endTurnEvent} with {} on end turn

events.name: Play Again
events.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

assetManifest.label: Asset Manifest
assetManifest.description: Direct asset manifest — takes priority over entity-derived manifest.

units.label: Units
units.description: Direct unit data — takes priority over entity-derived units.

tiles.label: Tiles
tiles.description: Direct tile data — takes priority over entity-derived tiles.

features.label: Features
features.description: Direct feature data — takes priority over entity-derived features.

frameCount.label: Frame count
frameCount.description: Number of sprite frames a unit cycles through before the animation loops.
